gameTitle: Mario & Sonic at the Olympic Winter Games

achievements.title: Heatin' up the Winter Games
achievements.description: Collect the stardust Shoes and complete your first mission
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Child's Play
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser Jr. in Frostown
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Bullying Parade
achievements.description: As Mario, defeat Bowser Jr. in Frostown while only using the L Button at the starting Dash and in the U-Turns
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: A Comet across the Sky
achievements.description: Collect the Comet Skis
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: The Smartest Fox There Is
achievements.description: Recruit Tails to your party in Frostown
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: I Have Standards, Y'Know?
achievements.description: As Sonic, defeat Tails in Frostown without getting anything worse than Great
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Ghostbuster in Town
achievements.description: Recruit Luigi to your party in Frostown
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Take the L
achievements.description: As Tails, defeat Luigi in Frostown without boosting
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Chances of Winning: Negative
achievements.description: Defeat Eggman Nega in Frostown
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: You Rushed Your Score
achievements.description: As Sonic, defeat Eggman Nega in Frostown in the Ski-Jumping LH portion with at least a combined score of 170,000
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Negative Time
achievements.description: As Sonic, defeat Eggman Nega in Frostown in the Cross-Country portion in under 15 minutes
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Hard as a Rock
achievements.description: Recruit Knuckles to your party in Frostown
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Knock! Knock! It's Your Broken Knuckle!
achievements.description: As Luigi, defeat Knuckles in Frostown without missing any shots

achievements.title: Frosted Over Papers
achievements.description: Find all obtainable Items in Frostown

achievements.title: Nipping at the Boards
achievements.description: Complete all missions in Frostown with any star rank

achievements.title: Jack Frost's Got Competition
achievements.description: Complete all missions in Frostown with a gold star

achievements.title: Blow It Up!
achievements.description: Collect the Battle Snow Machine

achievements.title: Frozen Peaches

achievements.description: As Mario, defeat Peach in Sparkleton without dropping below 50% health

achievements.description: Defeat Metal Sonic in Sparkleton

achievements.description: As Peach, defeat Metal Sonic in Sparkleton with a difference of at least 500 meters

achievements.title: Rodeo Dancing on the Sleigh
achievements.description: Collect the Rodeo Bobsleigh
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: A Girl with Hammer-tude
achievements.description: Recruit Amy to your party in Sparkleton
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Only Gold I Need Is My Fur
achievements.description: As Tails, defeat Amy in Sparkleton without shooting any golden targets

achievements.title: Bullseye!
achievements.description: Collect the Shooting Rifle

achievements.title: Bone Breaker
achievements.description: Defeat Dry Bowser in Sparkleton

achievements.description: As Knuckles, defeat Dry Bowser in Sparkleton without using more than 2 mushrooms

achievements.description: Find all obtainable Items in Sparkleton

achievements.title: I Ain't Scared of You
achievements.description: Defeat King Boo in Polastraits

achievements.description: Collect the Blitz Skeleton

achievements.description: Defeat Wario and Waluigi in Polastraits

achievements.description: As Luigi and Tails, defeat Wario and Waluigi in Polastraits in under a minute

achievements.description: Defeat Jet in Cubyrinth

achievements.description: As Sonic, defeat Jet in Cubyrinth with at least double the Points

achievements.title: Dream of Some Goals and You May Get Some Absolution
achievements.description: As Knuckes and Shadow, defeat Silver and Blaze in Cubyrinth with a difference of at least 200 points

achievements.description: Collect the Planetary Bobsleigh

achievements.description: As Silver and Blaze, defeat Big Bullet Bill in Cubyrinth without dropping below 50% health

achievements.description: Defeat Dry Bones in Icepeak

achievements.title: Dried Out Skills
achievements.description: As Yoshi, defeat Dry Bones in Icepeak with a difference of at least 3 points

achievements.title: He's a Detective You Want on Your Side
achievements.description: Recruit Vector to your party in Icepeak
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Monkey-Brained Turning
achievements.description: As Donkey Kong, defeat Vector in Icepeak without using the R Button in Lap 2 and 4

achievements.title: The Wealthy and the Wonderful
achievements.description: Recruit Wario and Waluigi to your party in Icepeak
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Too Heavy to Turn
achievements.description: As Vector, defeat Wario and Waluigi in Icepeak without drifting

achievements.title: Heatin' up the Winter Games in Another Way
achievements.description: Defeat Rouge in Icepeak
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Love Is in the Air
achievements.description: As Shadow, defeat Rouge in Icepeak with a combined score of at least 100,000

achievements.description: Recruit Daisy to your party in Blizland
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.description: As Blaze, defeat Daisy in Blizland while defeating at least 16 enemies and collecting at least 100 Rings

achievements.title: Busted Machine
achievements.description: Defeat Omega in Blizland

achievements.title: I've Got a Bone to Pick with Ya
achievements.description: As both Wario and Waluigi, defeat Dry Bowser in Blizland back to back with both characters

achievements.title: The Beautiful Winter of Vancouver
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser and Dr. Eggman in Blizland
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: This Is What U Need to Feel a Bit Hotter
achievements.description: As Mario and Sonic, defeat Bowser and Dr. Eggman in Blizland in the Blazing Bobsleigh portion without boosting

achievements.title: Fight against Somewhat Stronger Hockey Players

achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: But How Will I Know When I'm Your Super Star?
achievements.description: As Mario or Sonic, defeat Bowser and Dr. Eggman in Blizland in the Extreme Snowboarding portion without using any items

achievements.title: The Evilest Rematch

achievements.title: They Don't Like to Play in the Snow
achievements.description: As Bowser Jr. and Metal Sonic, defeat Bowser and Dr. Eggman in Blizland in the Blazing Bobsleigh portion without losing any health
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Fear Me Father
achievements.description: As Bowser Jr. and Metal Sonic, defeat Bowser and Dr. Eggman in Blizland in the Fever Hockey portion with a difference of at least 125
achievements.author: Darky

achievements.title: Don't Shed a Tear 'Cause, the Winter Is Never Ending
